description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.11.1 Docker image and defines a REPO_NAME variable pointing to gitlab.com/hostedprometheus/hostedprometheus. Add a global before_script that creates the GOPATH src directory for the repository, symlinks the project directory, changes into it, and runs git submodule init and update. Define two stages, test and build. In the test stage add a format job that runs go fmt $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/), then go vet $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/), and finally go test -race $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/). In the build stage add a compile job that runs GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -race -ldflags "-extldflags '-static'" -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/target/hostedprometheus_linux_amd64 internal/cmd/hostedprometheus/main.go and publishes the target directory as an artifact.
